steps.title: Contrast weight and movement
steps.content: The first two sentences emphasize heavy rhinestone adornments on Elvis's stage outfits. The next sentence shifts to the fabric, which was light and flexible enough to allow movement. The transition must signal contrast.

steps.title: Reject same-direction links
steps.content: Choice B signals clarification, but the fabric detail contrasts with the heavy adornments. Choice C signals an example, though light fabric is not an example of added weight. Choice D is a location word that does not create the needed relationship. The needed transition marks the opposing point. The answer is A.
